name: Ethiopian Orthodox Tewahedo Church
note: State church of Ethiopia since the 4th century (Aksumite Kingdom); the largest Oriental Orthodox church. Unique features: Old Testament dietary laws, the Ark of the Covenant veneration, the Book of Enoch in the canon. 'Tewahedo' means 'unified' (the fully divine-human nature of Christ). The largest Christian majority country in the Horn of Africa.
